title_english: Kol Akava Letova (Every Delay Is for the Good)
overview: An uplifting song of emunah about accepting life with love, holding onto hope through uncertainty, and remembering the divine spark within every person.

lyrics.english: I believe with complete faith

lyrics.hebrew: שכל מה שקורה איתי זה רק לטובתי
lyrics.transliteration: Shekol ma shekore iti ze rak letovati
lyrics.english: That everything happening to me is only for my good

lyrics.hebrew: ובאמת שאני לא כועס על אף אחד
lyrics.transliteration: Uveemet sheani lo koes al af echad
lyrics.english: And truly, I am not angry at anyone

lyrics.hebrew: כל יום לומד איך לשחרר קצת מעצמי
lyrics.transliteration: Kol yom lomed eich leshacherer ktsat meatzmi
lyrics.english: Each day I learn how to let go of a little of myself

lyrics.hebrew: אפחד לא יודע מה יהיה בסוף
lyrics.transliteration: Af echad lo yodea ma yihiye basof
lyrics.english: No one knows what will be in the end

lyrics.hebrew: ככה החיים שלי זה אוף אנ אוף
lyrics.transliteration: Kacha hachayim sheli ze of an of
lyrics.english: That is my life, up and down

lyrics.hebrew: מה שמשנה באמת זה רק הנשמה
lyrics.transliteration: Ma shemeshane beemet ze rak haneshama
lyrics.english: What truly matters is only the soul
Joy, health, and livelihood
The sea is stormy and I am inside a boat
I am tossed around, but I hold on tight
After everything
I am a part of God above
Every delay is for the good
I accept everything with love

lyrics.hebrew: גם אם לא נשאר לי שקל
lyrics.transliteration: Gam im lo nishar li shekel
lyrics.english: Even if I have no money left
I know it is all vanity of vanities

lyrics.hebrew: מה שלא יבוא אין יאוש בעולם
lyrics.transliteration: Ma shelo yavo ein yeush baolam
lyrics.english: Whatever comes, there is no despair in the world
Every delay is for the good

lyrics.hebrew: כל בן אדם נופל ואז הוא קם
lyrics.transliteration: Kol ben adam nofel veaz hu kam
lyrics.english: Every person falls and then rises
Every human voice goes and fades away
Every person
Every person
Is a part of God above
Let me speak, listen
Anyway, I am hyperactive
I do my best, I pray
That Father will be proud of me
With the right message in the songs
In the end we will still become rich
We will not wait for the tenth
My soul, in the end you will see
That every delay is for the good
I accept everything with love

lyrics.hebrew: גם אם לא נשאר לי שקל
lyrics.transliteration: Gam im lo nishar li shekel
lyrics.english: Even if I have no money left
I know it is all vanity of vanities

lyrics.hebrew: מה שלא יבוא אין יאוש בעולם
lyrics.transliteration: Ma shelo yavo ein yeush baolam
lyrics.english: Whatever comes, there is no despair in the world
Every delay is for the good

lyrics.hebrew: כל בן אדם נופל ואז הוא קם
lyrics.transliteration: Kol ben adam nofel veaz hu kam
lyrics.english: Every person falls and then rises
Every human voice goes and fades away
Every person
Every person
Is a part of God above

lyrics.hebrew: אפחד לא יודע מה יהיה בסוף
lyrics.transliteration: Af echad lo yodea ma yihiye basof
lyrics.english: No one knows what will be in the end

lyrics.hebrew: ככה החיים האלה אוף אנ אוף
lyrics.transliteration: Kacha hachayim haele of an of
lyrics.english: That is this life, up and down

lyrics.hebrew: מה שמשנה באמת זה רק הנשמה
lyrics.transliteration: Ma shemeshane beemet ze rak haneshama
lyrics.english: What truly matters is only the soul
Joy, health, and livelihood
The sea is stormy and I am inside a boat
I am tossed around, but I hold on tight
But after everything
I am a part of God above
